info.anubanDaviSezaH: 1.936 glAsnAvanuvamAM ca iti gaRasUtreRa upasargasya anupasTitO vikalpena mittvam
info.english_meaning: to be tired to wane to be fatigued to be exhausted
info.hindI_arTa: mlAna honA glAniyukta honA jamhAI lenA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'nAnuDyAyAd bahUYCabdAnvAco viglApanaM hi tat' (CAM0 u0) viglApanaM vyayaH apakzayaH
'tanno viglApayati' (BA0 pu0 3222) viglApayati Kedayati vimanAyayati vimanaskAnkarotItyarTaH
'paryAdayo glAnAdyarTe caturTyA' iti vArtike pariglAno'DyayanAya paryaDyayana ityudAharaRaM sTitam aDyayane'naBiruciranutsuko'samarTa ityarTaH
